{%- extends "!header.html" %} {{ super() }} {% block header_logo %} {%- if theme_logo_dark %} {%- endif -%} {%- if theme_logo_light %} {%- endif -%} {% endblock %} {% block header_main_nav %} {{ super() }}
{% set langs = [("en", "EN"), ("es", "ES"), ("ca", "CA")] %} {% set depth = pagename.split('/')|length - 1 %} {% set vfolder = current_version.name if current_version is defined else "main" %} {% for code, label in langs %} {% if language == code %} {{ label }} {% else %} {{ label }} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endblock %}
